summary.situation: Reviewer comments are scored first, then surfaced as public-facing review signals.

reviewers.label: Solid Signal
reviewers.summary: Actionable review with concrete experimental requests.

dimensions.label: Specificity
dimensions.criterion: Solid specificity: How concrete and inspectable the reviewer comment is.

dimensions.label: Evidence Link
dimensions.criterion: Solid evidence link: Whether the comment gives reasons, evidence, or manuscript anchors.

dimensions.label: Actionability
dimensions.criterion: Strong actionability: Whether the authors can turn the comment into a response or revision.

dimensions.label: Peer Support
dimensions.criterion: Solid peer support: Whether nearby reviewer signals support or conflict with this concern.

dimensions.label: Rebuttal Risk
dimensions.criterion: Mixed rebuttal risk: useful but uneven.

dimensions.label: Tone
dimensions.criterion: Solid tone: Whether the comment is constructive, calibrated, and professional.

reviewers.label: Needs Signal
reviewers.summary: Raises a real rebuttal-survival risk but with weaker substantiation.

comments.text: The paper should compare against a standard retrieval baseline and report runtime.
comments.second_opinion: This is concrete, answerable, and strongly supported by external actionability examples.

comments.text: The theorem assumptions remain unclear after the rebuttal.
comments.second_opinion: The point is specific, but the current response only partially addresses it.
